overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a peaceful evening walk through Los Santos at sunset. The player moves along rain-soaked streets reflecting the golden-orange sky, transitioning from a historic brick district past modern apartment buildings, and under a pedestrian overpass where a food truck drives by.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic urban street with wet pavement and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet street beside a large historic brick building with illuminated windows

entered.detail: large multi-story brick building with arched windows and illuminated interior lights
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines
white painted metal fence running along the sidewalk edge
tall art deco style tower with green roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking alongside a grand historic brick building on the left, with tall palm trees and a white metal railing on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the golden sunset sky, and power lines stretch overhead toward a distant art deco tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with modern apartment buildings

events.description: turning left at the intersection to enter a new street
historic brick building exits view as modern apartment buildings come into focus

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and crossing the wet street toward modern apartment buildings

entered.detail: grey multi-story modern apartment complex with external balconies and large windows
traffic signal poles at the intersection showing red lights

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, leaving the historic district behind. The scene opens into a wider intersection area with a modern grey apartment building dominating the right side. Traffic lights hang above the wet crosswalk as the camera crosses the street, with the distant art deco tower now visible to the left.

events.description: white and yellow food truck drives past from left to right
entering the covered shadow area beneath the pedestrian overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under a pedestrian overpass as a food truck drives past from the left

notable_agents.action: white food truck with yellow and red signage driving from left to right across the path

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge with metal framework and hanging greenery passing overhead
brown wooden plank wall running along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes beneath a pedestrian overpass with hanging vines, entering a semi-covered alleyway. The modern apartment building now appears on the left as the camera moves past it. A white food truck with colorful signage drives across the path from left to right, and the lighting shifts to a darker, mixed tone under the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a city street that transitions from a historic brick district into a modern urban corridor under a sunset sky. It begins alongside a grand brick building and tall palm trees, where the wet asphalt reflects golden light beneath overhead power lines stretching toward a distant art deco tower. As the camera turns left at an intersection, the historic architecture gives way to a wide crossing dominated by a modern grey apartment building and hanging traffic lights. The scene then shifts as the camera passes beneath a vine-covered pedestrian overpass, moving into a semi-covered alleyway where the lighting turns darker and more muted. Finally, the movement continues past the apartment building as a white food truck with colorful signage drives across the path from left to right.
